suggestions.title: Make the anchor-lineage survey the project’s primary validated output
suggestions.description: Yesterday’s anchor rewrite produced `non_autoregressive_lm_survey_anchor_lineage.md`, but `README.md` and both validation scripts still treat the older long survey as canonical. Codex can update the build/validate path so the concise group-meeting artifact is the one the project actually checks and presents.
suggestions.prompt: Promote `non_autoregressive_lm_survey_anchor_lineage.md` to the project’s primary deliverable. Update `README.md`, `scripts/validate_manifest.py`, `scripts/check_local_links.py`, and any related logs or docs so the concise anchor-lineage survey is the default validated output for this repo, while preserving the older full survey as an archived artifact. Then run the validation flow and summarize what changed.

suggestions.title: Turn the 12-anchor survey into a 45–60 minute group-meeting deck draft
suggestions.description: The repo now has a fresh anchor-paper narrative (`paper_selection.md` + the Jun 26 anchor survey), which is exactly the structure needed for the talk promised in the project brief. Codex can convert that into a slide-ready outline with figures/tables to reuse and speaker notes instead of making you manually compress the survey again.
suggestions.prompt: Create a slide-deck draft for the group meeting from `non_autoregressive_lm_survey_anchor_lineage.md` and `paper_selection.md`. Produce a concise Markdown slide outline in this project with 12–16 slides, section timing for a 45–60 minute talk, per-slide key claims, which local tables/figures to reuse, and short speaker notes for likely questions about AR vs NAR, masked diffusion vs MLM, and continuous-token vs latent approaches.

suggestions.title: Turn the 12-anchor rewrite into a 45-minute talk deck
suggestions.description: `non_autoregressive_lm_survey_anchor_lineage.md` and `paper_selection.md` were updated on June 26, 2026, and there is still no slide artifact in the project. Codex can turn the new anchor/bridge structure into a Chinese deck with speaker notes, one equation per anchor, and backup slides for the speed/KV-cache questions.
suggestions.prompt: Build a 45–60 minute Chinese group-meeting slide deck from `non_autoregressive_lm_survey_anchor_lineage.md` and `paper_selection.md`. Create a presentation artifact in this project, keep the 12 anchor papers as the main spine, include one key equation and one comparison takeaway per anchor, and add a short backup appendix for the likely discussion points around MLM vs masked diffusion, why XLNet is still autoregressive, and when DLMs are actually faster than AR models.

suggestions.title: Repair the non-autoregressive NMT repo entry in the manifest
suggestions.description: `logs/acquisition_report.md` still shows the only real acquisition failure: the `non-autoregressive-nmt` official repo URL 404s, while the rest of the workspace validates cleanly. Codex can re-audit the paper’s primary sources, fix `data/papers.yaml`, and either update the clone target or document that official code is no longer recoverable.
suggestions.prompt: Re-audit the `non-autoregressive-nmt` repository record from primary sources and fix the local project state. Check the paper metadata and any official project links, update `data/papers.yaml` and the acquisition logs, and if an official repo still exists prepare the corrected clone target; otherwise record a precise evidence-based reason that the official code is unavailable instead of leaving the broken 404 link.
